PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-11-2008 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Of Will Contest
Off Calendar Feb-11-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ed Kaplowitz for Martin Ethington (Contestant). Bruce Feder Special Aministrator. Robert Shepard for the Petitioner.

Mr. Kaplowitz reported that the settlement had been signed by all interested parties. All counsel concurred. Mr. Feder stated that the estate was less than $100,000.00, that no status was needed, and that the appropriate documents would be filed. The Court approved the settlement, (signing the order for the same in open court). The Petition For Probate Of Will And For Letters Testamentary filed by Mr. Shepard was taken off calendar.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Hill.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-07-2008 Continued To Feb-11-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-26-2007 Continued To Jan-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appaerances: Ed Kaplowitz for Beneficiary. Bruce Feder (Special Administrator). Robert Shepard for Robert Geiwitz.

Mr. Kaplowitz reported that the estate was worth less than $100,000.00 and requested to go to Pro Bono Mediation. All parties agreed to go to mediation, (Order for the same signed in open court). Mediation is to be completed by December 31, 2007. The matter was continued to January 7, 2008 for status on mediation.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
Bailiff: Deputy Lee.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-22-2007 Continued To Nov-26-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Ed Koplowitz appearing for objector Martin Ethington. Mr. Koplowitz reported that all counsel are in agreement of a continuance. Bruce Feder has been appointed as the special administrator to marshall the assets. Matter is continued to 11/26.
Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Ella Yip. Reporter: Patrick Heard CSR# 11055. Bailiff: O. Arias.

Petition For Letters Of Special Administration
Off Calendar Oct-01-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Letters Of Special Administration
Off Calendar Sep-27-2007 Continued To Oct-01-07 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 202

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-24-2007 Continued To Oct-22-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Edward A. Koplowitz appearing for Martin Ethington. He has spoken with Mr. Shepard and they have agreed to appoint Bruce Feder as the Special Administrator. Matter is continued to 10/22 for status of the petition.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Rob Harris.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-13-2007 Continued To Sep-24-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ed Koplowitz appearing for Martin Ethington; Robert Shepard appearing for Robert Geiwitz.

Mr. Koplowitz indicated that the one small asset may be payable on death account and consequently, recommended that the Court appoint a special administrator. The Court continued the matter to September 24, 2007.

Judicial Officer: Commissioner Dorothy L. McMath; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722; Bailiff: Saephan; Clerks: R. Michael Diles and C. Joy Guandique.
